common.leagueLogoAlt: Benito Juarez Men's Baseball League logo

footer.aboutText: Chicago's Benito Juarez Men's Baseball League brings together local teams, weekly competition, and community baseball all season long.
footer.portalCopy: Schedule, standings, rosters, and league news in one place.
footer.adminCopyAuthed: Commissioner access is intentionally kept low-profile.

home.aboutText: Benito Juarez Men's League is a community baseball league built around competitive weekend games, local teams, and a long-running Chicago baseball tradition.
home.loadError: Unable to load the league dashboard right now.
home.noUpcomingDescription: Upcoming matchups will appear here as soon as the schedule is posted.
home.recentResultsDescription: Latest final scores already entered into the league schedule.
home.noResultsDescription: Completed games will show here once results are posted.
home.announcementsDescription: Quick league updates, notices, and commissioner posts.
home.noAnnouncementsDescription: Recent league updates will appear here.
home.noStandingsDescription: Team records will appear after final scores are entered.
home.todayScheduleDescription: Check upcoming matchups and final scores.
home.teamRostersDescription: Browse teams, records, and player lists.
home.announcementsLinkDescription: Read the latest league updates and notices.
home.seasonNoteText: This portal is designed for quick checks at the field: schedule first, standings second, announcements close at hand, and commissioner tools available without leaving the main workflow pages.
